description: Sector overlay for French electricity, gas, energy supply, network operation, renewable-energy, nuclear-interface, and power-sector documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Energy and Power. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: CRE regulated-activity or supplier authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for electricity/gas supplier, network-access, balancing, metering, tariff, or CRE-regulated status evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Energy customer information or complaint handling evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer disclosures, tariff information, energy bills, complaints, mediation, or consumer redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Environmental, emissions, renewable, or safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for environmental authorization, renewable-energy compliance, emissions, waste, safety, or energy-transition evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Nuclear/radiation safety evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for nuclear safety, radiation protection, ASNR, controlled area, or radioprotection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
